caption: A man is pictured in a sequence of shots, appearing within a rounded rectangular cutout against a solid black background. He is dressed in a dark, patterned traditional garment with white cuffs and a dark cap. He stands in an indoor setting with a neutral-colored wall behind him, facing slightly toward the camera with a neutral to slight smiling expression. He remains stationary throughout the sequence, holding a small, light-colored object in his hands. The text "Seyi Adebola" appears in a small, white font in the lower-left and lower-center regions of the black background. Across the progression of the frames, there is minimal movement; the man's posture and expression remain consistent, and the overall composition and framing of the scene do not change.
